summary: Deterministic proof that review prompt preparation keeps compare artifact paths and human review prompts on the same durable review boundary so human and machine reviewers can refer to the same compare output.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: adapter review prompt compare artifact path contract
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the adapter-contract claim that review prompts point at the same compare output path as machine review evidence is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Every consumer adapter writes a compare-report.json file.
Every executor variant reads the compare artifact directly instead of through the rendered prompt or prompt input packet.
The compare artifact verdict is semantically correct for a real candidate.

protectedBehaviors: review prompt input preserves artifactFiles[0].relativePath as artifacts/compare-report.json
review prompt input preserves humanReviewPrompts[0].id as real-user
rendered review prompt includes the human review lens and the same artifacts/compare-report.json path
rendered review prompt includes the compare artifact summary from the report mode summary
BuildReviewPacket collects adapter artifact_paths including artifacts/compare-report.json
BuildReviewPacket keeps comparison_questions and human_review_prompts in the same cautilus.review_packet.v1 boundary
CLI build-prompt-input carries current report evidence and compare artifact summary into the prompt input
CLI render-prompt emits the output-under-test and current report evidence sections for reviewer-visible failure

decision.reason: Review packet construction collects the compare artifact path, comparison questions, and human review prompts into one review packet; prompt input construction carries the artifact path and human review lens forward; and prompt rendering exposes the same compare artifact path and compare summary for human review.
